Disability Insurance and Income Protection

Short-term vs long-term disability, workers' compensation differences, benefit periods, elimination periods, and evidence requirements.

Source shelf

  1. NAIC Disability Insurance Consumer Insight (NAIC)

User pain signals

  • reddit: Insurer denied claim due to aggressive driver behavior
  • reddit: Dad sick, no insurance, bills piling up
  • reddit: Company backdated firing, cutting health insurance and causing large bill
  • reddit: Aflac denied mental health short term disability claim
  • reddit: Apartment flooded, insurer offers zero concessions despite restoration.
  • youtube: Users feel insurance is a scam; agents push commissions and claims are denied.
  • youtube: User had disability claim denied twice despite full documentation.
  • youtube: Physician hospitalized, now homeless, awaiting insurance payout.

Long-tail SEO angles

  • disability income gap calculator self employed
  • seguro de incapacidad para trabajadores independientes

Sources

  1. NAIC Disability Insurance Consumer Insight (NAIC)
